query_name: R/wローリング_前週からのR/w変化傾向
query_string:
with week_list as (
  select distinct processing_date
  from hst_weekly_customer_rf
  where time >= td_time_parse('2023-10-01', 'jst')
)

, weekly_customer_status as (
  select distinct
      processing_date
    , customer_id
    , r_week
    , f
    , nomination_last_order
    , shop_no_last_order
    , shop_name as shop_name_last_order
  from hst_weekly_customer_rf as t0
  left join mst_shop as t1
    on cast(t0.shop_no_last_order as varchar) = t1.shop_no
  where t0.time between td_time_parse('2023-10-01', 'jst')
                    and td_date_trunc('week', td_scheduled_time(), 'jst')
)

, weekly_order as (
  select distinct
    td_time_string(td_date_trunc('week', time, 'jst'), 'd!', 'jst') as processing_date
    , customer_id
  from cls_order_detail
  where time >= td_time_parse('2023-10-01', 'jst')
    and order_id_hour_seq = 1
)

, agg as (
  select
      coalesce(t0.processing_date, t1.processing_date) as processing_date
    , coalesce(t0.customer_id, t1.customer_id) as customer_id
    , case
        when r_week is null and coalesce(t0.customer_id, t1.customer_id) is null then '新規(非会員)'
        when r_week is null and coalesce(t0.customer_id, t1.customer_id) is not null then '新規(会員)'
        when r_week between 1 and 4 then 'R/w1-4'
        when r_week between 5 and 8 then 'R/w5-8'
        when r_week between 9 and 12 then 'R/w9-12'
        when r_week between 13 and 24 then 'R/w13-24'
        when r_week between 25 and 52 then 'R/w25-52'
        when r_week >= 53 then 'R/w53-'
        else '不明'
      end as r_week
    , f
  from weekly_customer_status as t0
  full join weekly_order as t1
    on t0.processing_date = t1.processing_date
   and t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
)

, prev_week as (
  select
    processing_date
    , customer_id
    , r_week
    , f
    , lag(r_week) over (partition by customer_id order by processing_date) as r_week_prev
    , lag(f) over (partition by customer_id order by processing_date) as f_prev
  from agg
)

, agg_total as (
  select
    processing_date
    , r_week_prev
    , count(distinct customer_id) as uu_total
  from prev_week
  group by 1,2
)

select
  year_of_week(date(processing_date)) as "年"
  , week_of_year(date(processing_date)) as "週数"
  , 'w'||cast(week_of_year(date(processing_date)) as varchar)||'_'||processing_date as "営業日の週"
  , r_week_prev as "R/w（前週）"
  , case
      when r_week = 'R/w1-4' and r_week_prev = 'R/w1-4' and f > f_prev then r_week_prev||'→'||r_week||'（来店あり）'
      else r_week_prev||'→'||r_week
    end as "ステータス"
  , count(distinct customer_id) as "顧客数"
  , uu_total as "顧客数(前週R/w）"
from prev_week
left join agg_total using (processing_date, r_week_prev)
where r_week = 'R/w1-4'
      and year_of_week(date(processing_date)) >= 2024
group by 1,2,3,4
order by 1,2,3,4
